title: Purpose and need are stated
question: Does the EA package identify the purpose and need for action?

title: Alternatives are described
question: Does the EA package describe the proposed action and alternatives?

title: Environmental effects are analyzed
question: Does the EA package analyze affected environment and environmental effects?

title: Related environmental compliance is addressed

title: FONSI and mitigation support are traceable
